description_long: This object is a round, flat baked good with a golden-brown surface and scattered dark chocolate chips embedded throughout the top and sides. The edges are slightly irregular, giving it a homemade appearance, and the surface texture is matte with a subtle roughness typical of baked dough. The chocolate chips are unevenly distributed, some partially melted and others protruding slightly above the surface. The sides show a lighter, slightly porous texture, indicating a soft, airy interior. There is no visible wrapper, frosting, or decorative elements, and the object appears to be resting or floating with no visible support or plate.
description: A round, golden-brown muffin with scattered chocolate chips and a soft, slightly rough surface. No wrapper, frosting, or decorations are present.
description_view_0: The muffin is seen from a slightly angled side, highlighting the golden-brown top and several prominent chocolate chips near the edge.
description_view_1: This view shows more of the side, with chocolate chips visible along the edge and a flatter top surface.
description_view_2: The muffin appears flatter from this angle, with fewer visible chocolate chips and a lighter, more porous side.
description_view_3: The top surface is more prominent, with chocolate chips less clustered and the edge appearing slightly more irregular.
